description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 85% cotton and 15% viscose, has short sleeves, branding in distressed graphic print on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsGroove to the tunes of American music in style with this green t-shirt from wrangler. Pay tribute to the brand that set up shop the 1940s and grew to tremendous heights to clothe the world in fabulous casualwear. The short sleeves sit snug on well-toned arms, while the cotton fabric keeps your fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes or cotton shorts and leather sandals for unparalleled cool.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
